description: Configure the navigation lights for a new 'PilotBoat_ORC' vessel model. Using the vessel geometry specification at /home/ga/Documents/geometry_spec.txt, determine the coordinates for the required navigation lights (Masthead, Port Sidelight, Starboard Sidelight, and Sternlight) and update the vessel configuration file at /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Othership/PilotBoat_ORC/boat.ini with the corresponding [Light] sections. Ensure the lights have the correct positions and colors (Red=Port, Green=Starboard, White=Masthead/Stern).
